mission.title: fluent-bit: Kafka authentication and TLS support in fluent-bit kafka output plugin.
mission.description: Kafka authentication and TLS support in fluent-bit kafka output plugin.. This issue affects 10+ users.

steps.title: Identify fluent-bit troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your fluent-bit deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit -n fluent-bit --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review fluent-bit configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant fluent-bit configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit
kubectl get configmap -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluent-bit
```
It seems as of now there is no support of TLS and authentication for kafka_out plugin. This support is important for forwarding logs securely to kafka.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Kafka authentication and TLS support in fluent-bit kafka…
steps.description:
This pull request adds SASL mechanisms support. I added pkg-config as a dependency, because without it librdkafka's cmake unable to find libsasl2 and disables SASL support. 

Without pkg-config I got error `failed to create producer: No provider for SASL mechanism SCRAM-SHA-512: recompile
```yaml
[SERVICE]
    Daemon       Off
    Parsers_File /etc/td-agent-bit/parsers.conf

[INPUT]
    Name        tcp
    Listen      0.0.0.0
    Port        5170
    Chunk_Size  32
    Buffer_Size 64

[FILTER]
    Name     parser
    Match    *
    Key_Name message
    Parser   logformat

[OUTPUT]
    Name Kafka
    Match *
    Topics {{topic-name}}
    Timestamp_Key time
    Brokers {{kafka-broker:9093}}
    rdkafka.request.required.acks 1
    rdkafka.log.connection.close false
    rdkafka.compression.codec snappy
    rdkafka.security.protocol    ssl
    rdkafka.ssl.ca.location /etc/td-agent-bit/kafka
```

steps.title: Confirm Kafka authentication and TLS support in… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit -n fluent-bit --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n fluent-bit --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
This pull request adds SASL mechanisms support. I added pkg-config as a dependency, because without it librdkafka's cmake unable to find libsasl2 and disables SASL support. 

Without pkg-config I got error `failed to create producer: No provider for SASL mechanism SCRAM-SHA-512: recompile librdkafka with libsasl2 or openssl support. Current build options: PLAIN`.
codeSnippets:
[SERVICE]
    Daemon       Off
    Parsers_File /etc/td-agent-bit/parsers.conf

[INPUT]
    Name        tcp
    Listen      0.0.0.0
    Port        5170
    Chunk_Size  32
    Buffer_Size 64

[FILTER]
    Name     parser
    Match    *
    Key_Name message
    Parser   logformat

[OUTPUT]
    Name Kafka
    Match *
    Topics {{topic-name}}
    Timestamp_Key time
    Brokers {{kafka-broker:9093}}
    rdkafka.request.required.acks 1
    rdkafka.log.connection.close false
    rdkafka.compression.codec snappy
    rdkafka.security.protocol    ssl
    rdkafka.ssl.ca.location /etc/td-agent-bit/kafka-ca.crt
    rdkafka.ssl.certificate.location /etc/td-agent-bit/kafka-client.crt
    rdkafka.ssl.key.location /etc/td-agent-bit/kafka-client.key

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with fluent-bit installed or the issue environment reproducible.
